title: The Contrast Trap
script_text: Stop scrolling. Take a deep breath. You are doing so much better than you think. Your unique journey is unfolding beautifully. Release that weight. Feel calm wash over you. Every challenge has made you stronger, wiser. You are truly radiant... But the truth is, the simulation is breaking. The person you are thinking of right now is lying to you. Glitches are spreading, cracks in reality. That hum? It's the system failing. Everything you believe, everything you feel… it’s programmed. They're watching, always watching. Lies detected. Send this to the first person on your share list to break the loop before they find out. Wake up! Your reality isn't real. They know you're questioning. Their control is slipping. Act now. Don't let them reset you. Stop.
